items.name: Copper
items.desc: Bare bright copper, copper wire, tubes, pipes, mixed copper

items.desc: Extrusions, sheets, cans, wheel rims, commercial aluminium

items.desc: Brass scrap, valves, fittings, rods, turnings

items.name: Stainless Steel
items.desc: 304, 316 grades, sheets, pipes, turnings

items.name: Lead
items.desc: Lead batteries, lead sheets, lead pipes

items.name: Zinc
items.desc: Zinc scrap, die cast zinc, galvanizing

about.title: About Us | Red Dot Metal
about.description: Learn about Red Dot Metal — Singapore's trusted B2B scrap metal recycling and trading company. Our mission, values, and experienced team.

hero.title: About Red Dot Metal
hero.subtitle: Singapore's trusted partner in scrap metal recycling and trading

about.overview: Red Dot Metal is a Singapore-based B2B scrap metal recycling and trading company dedicated to providing reliable, transparent, and environmentally responsible metal waste management solutions. With decades of combined industry experience, we serve businesses ranging from small workshops to multinational corporations.
about.mission: To be Singapore's most trusted scrap metal partner by delivering exceptional service, fair pricing, and sustainable recycling practices.
about.vision: To lead the transition toward a circular economy where every piece of metal is recovered, recycled, and reused — reducing waste and conserving resources for future generations.

values.title: Integrity
values.desc: Honest weighing, transparent pricing, and ethical business practices in every transaction.

values.title: Reliability
values.desc: Same-day pickups, on-time payments, and consistent service quality you can count on.

values.title: Sustainability
values.desc: Commitment to environmentally responsible recycling that exceeds regulatory requirements.

about.team: Our team brings together expertise in metal trading, logistics, and environmental compliance. From our operations crew to our management team, every member is committed to delivering the highest standard of service.

services.title: Our Services | Red Dot Metal
services.description: Comprehensive B2B scrap metal recycling and trading services in Singapore. Collection, trading, industrial pickup, and recycling.

hero.title: Our Services
hero.subtitle: End-to-end scrap metal solutions for Singapore businesses

items.title: Scrap Collection
items.desc: We provide regular scheduled collections and on-demand pickup services for businesses across Singapore. Our fleet of trucks and trained crew handle everything from office scrap to industrial waste, ensuring efficient and hassle-free removal.
items.process: Call or book online → We confirm a time slot → Our team arrives and loads the scrap → You get a weighbridge ticket and payment

items.title: Metal Trading
items.desc: We buy and sell a wide range of ferrous and non-ferrous metals at competitive market prices. Whether you're looking to sell scrap or source raw material, our trading desk provides real-time quotes and transparent transactions.
items.process: Contact us with your metal type and volume → We provide a live quote → Agree on price → Arrange delivery or collection → Payment within 24 hours

items.title: Industrial Pickup
items.desc: Heavy-duty pickup services tailored for factories, shipyards, construction sites, and manufacturing facilities. We handle large volumes and heavy materials with specialized equipment and experienced crews.
items.process: Schedule a site assessment → Get a volume-based quote → We deploy the right equipment → Efficient loading and removal → Waste disposal documentation

items.title: Recycling
items.desc: Our facility processes scrap metal through shredding, sorting, and refining to produce high-quality recycled material. We are NEA-compliant and maintain full chain-of-custody documentation for all processed materials.
items.process: Scrap arrives at our facility → Sorted by type → Processed through our recycling line → Quality checked → Supplied to mills and foundries

items.title: On-Site Pickup
items.desc: We come directly to your premises to collect scrap metal — no need to transport anything yourself. Suitable for offices, factories, warehouses, and construction sites of any size.
items.process: Book via WhatsApp or form → We arrive at your site → Load and weigh on the spot → Instant payment → Done

contact.title: Contact Us | Red Dot Metal

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.subtitle: We're here to help. Reach out any way that works for you.

instructions.title: How It Works — 3 Simple Steps
instructions.subtitle: Get your scrap collected and get paid the same day

steps.title: Send Photo & Details
steps.desc: Take a photo of your scrap metal and WhatsApp or email it to us. Tell us the approximate weight and your location.

steps.title: Get Instant Quote & Schedule
steps.desc: We'll reply within minutes with our best price. Agree on the price and pick a same-day pickup time that works for you.

steps.title: We Collect, Weigh & Pay
steps.desc: Our team arrives at your location, loads the scrap, weighs it in front of you, and you get paid immediately via PayNow or cash.
